summary: Postinstall script with child_process and HTTP activity warrants manual review
details: The package ships a postinstall.js that imports child_process and performs both GET and POST HTTP operations during installation. Postinstall lifecycle hooks combining process spawning with outbound HTTP are a high-risk pattern (potential install-time fetch-and-execute or data exfiltration), but the specific destinations, payloads, and whether fetched content is executed have not been confirmed. Routing to human review to inspect postinstall.js and determine intent before publishing a verdict.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
